message:
✨ Todo prompt editor with line clamping, modal editor, and AI help (#168)

- Clamp long descriptions to 4 lines with ellipsis in todo panel
- Double-click opens modal editor instead of inline textarea
- Add 'Help from AI' button that suggests prompt improvements
- 'Use suggestion' button to apply AI-suggested prompt
- Hover shows full prompt text via title attribute
- Fix schedule picker layout (flexWrap prevents vertical overflow)
- Add /api/improve-prompt server endpoint using ACP manager
- Fix event handler types for ACP manager (Error vs string)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
